condition.ptxt: Only one low-beam headlight lights up

action.ptxt: Replace bulb.
Replace ballast or igniter.

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.

condition.ptxt: Both low-beam headlights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .
Replace bulbs.
Replace ballast or igniter.

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.

condition.ptxt: Only one high-beam headlight lights up

action.ptxt: Replace bulb.
Replace ballast or igniter.

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.

condition.ptxt: Both high-beam headlights do not light up

action.ptxt: Replace bulbs.

ps.ptxt: Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .
Replace ballast or igniter.

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.

condition.ptxt: Headlight auto leveling system does not operate

ps.ptxt: Faulty headlight auto leveling and washer control module

action.ptxt: Refer to Inspection of Headlight Auto Leveling and Washer Control Module and Its Circuit .

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.
Refer to Vehicle Height Sensor Inspection .

ps.ptxt: Faulty headlight units (including headlight leveling actuators)

action.ptxt: Refer to Headlight Leveling Actuator Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Fog lights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.
Replace bulbs.

item.ptxt: Front fog light switch: refer to Front Fog Light Switch Inspection .
Rear fog light switch: refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Dome light or spot light does not light up

action.ptxt: Refer to Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits .

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.
Replace bulbs.
Refer to Front and Rear Door Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Clearance lights, tail lights or license plate lights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.
Replace bulbs.

ps.ptxt: Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .
Refer to Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits .

condition.ptxt: Back up lights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.
Replace bulbs.
Refer to Back Up Light Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Brake lights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.
Replace bulbs.
Refer to Brake Light Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Turn signal / hazard warning lights do not flash

action.ptxt: Refer to Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits .

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.
Replace bulbs.

ps.ptxt: Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .
Refer to Hazard Warning Switch Inspection .
